---
title: 'Sayings to Live By'
date: '2014-01-23T16:19:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '7010077934124963566'
blogger_filename: '/p/sayings-to-live-by.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Sayings to Live By<br />
<br />
&nbsp;- I don't have all the answers; but I know Who does.<br />
<br />
&nbsp;- I must know what I must know. Him who died and rose again has provided all I need. 2 Correct 9.<br />
<br />
&nbsp;- Seek first the kingdom of God and you'll prosper more on accident than you ever did on purpose. Andrew Womack. If you are not prospering it's either because you haven't been seeking God or haven't been long enough.<br />
&nbsp;- Live like no-one else so you can live like no one else.
